text.title: Claude API Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from a fresh integration request to one of four concrete code shapes. Branches name observable inputs; leaves cite rule ids from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the workload OFFLINE (no human waiting on any single response, and ≥100 requests in the queue)?

branch.question: Does the request require tools / multi-turn agentic loop?
Is the system+tools prefix ≥1024 tokens AND repeated across requests?
Is task in {math, multi-step-code-debug, contract-analysis, multi-step-planning, research-synthesis} AND expected output ≥200 tokens?
Is the system+context prefix ≥1024 tokens AND repeated?

text.example: offline=false → tools_required=true (search + cite tool) → cacheable=true (3200-token system+corpus) → thinking_payoff=false (200-word summaries, no deep reasoning) → cached-streaming-agent referencing cache-longest-stable-prefix.
offline=true (12k docs, no UI) → batch-job referencing batch-never-for-interactive (it forbids the reverse — Batch IS the right answer here).
